title: Weather forecast for Monday to Wednesday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from South African Weather Service, Monday will begin cloudy but clear to sunshine.


> A high of 17°C can be expected in George, Knysna and Plettenberg Bay with Mossel Bay and Riversdale slightly warmer at 20°C.


The Karoo can expect slightly higher maximums with 21°C in Oudtshoorn and 20°C in Graaff-Reinet.

Tuesday 17 September looks to be sunny along the coast with mild temperatures while it will be cooler in the Karoo with a slight possibility of rain.


> Sunrise will be at 06:23 on Tuesday morning with sunset at 18:21.


Wednesday will see the arrival of a cold front, bringing light rain and lower temperatures across the area.

A yellow level-2 warning for damaging wind and waves leading to difficulty in navigation at sea is expected between Saldanha Bay and Plettenberg Bay from Wednesday afternoon until Thursday, 19 September.

You can expect a high of 16°C in George, Knysna and Plettenberg Bay. Mossel Bay will reach 18°C and Riversdale can expect a high of 21°C. In the Karoo, Oudtshoorn can expect a high of 24°C and Graaff-Reinet a high of 28°C.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
